prompt: Create a cinematic dark-fantasy anime travel-camp scene at night in a dense forest, widescreen 16:9 composition, highly detailed painterly concept art. In the left foreground, a small campfire glows orange beneath a hanging black kettle on a three-legged tripod, with exactly 4 visible camp props around it: a brass lantern, a metal mug, stacked wooden crates or luggage, and a rolled log or bedroll. Beside the fire sits a young girl mage, pale silver-pink bobbed hair with a red flower hair ornament, wearing a white blouse, red ribbon tie, dark cloak, and travel skirt, looking upward with anxious admiration. Center frame stands a tall adult male sorcerer-guard, black military coat with gold trim, high collar, belts, gloves, boots, and a sweeping cape with deep red lining; his face is intentionally indistinct and shadowed, one arm extended forward in a protective spellcasting gesture. From his raised hand, radiant golden magic erupts in broad arcing ribbons and sparkling particles, sweeping from center-left to the right side like a barrier or wind slash. On the right half of the image, show exactly 5 hostile shadow-beasts made of twisted bark, feathers, smoke, and debris: one lunging beast near the center glow, one large birdlike beast tumbling in the lower right foreground, one spiked monster in the mid-right, one dragonlike creature in the upper right, and one partially hidden creature in the dark left background. The golden spell blasts leaves, dirt, splinters, and embers through the air while the forest behind remains nearly black with faint trunks and foliage. Mood: heroic protection during a dangerous journey; lighting: strong warm firelight and magical gold against cool blue-black shadows; style: epic Japanese fantasy light-novel illustration, ultra-detailed, dramatic motion, volumetric sparks, atmospheric depth, no text, no frame, no watermark.
